member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.Post(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Posts this Event on a GameObject.

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.Post(UnityEngine.GameObject,AK.Wwise.CallbackFlags,AkCallbackManager.EventCallback,System.Object)
member.summary: Posts this Event on a GameObject.
member.param: Optional cookie received by the callback

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.Post(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.UInt32,AkCallbackManager.EventCallback,System.Object)
member.summary: Posts this Event on a GameObject.
member.param: Optional cookie received by the callback

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.ExecuteAction(UnityEngine.GameObject,AkActionOnEventType,System.Int32,AkCurveInterpolation)
member.summary: Executes various actions on this event associated with a GameObject.

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.PostMIDI(UnityEngine.GameObject,AkMIDIPostArray)
member.summary: Posts MIDI Events on this Event associated with a GameObject.
member.param: The array of AkMIDIPost that are posted.

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.PostMIDI(UnityEngine.GameObject,AkMIDIPostArray,System.Int32)
member.summary: Posts MIDI Events on this Event associated with a GameObject.
member.param: The array of AkMIDIPost that are posted.
The number of elements from the array that will be posted.

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.StopMIDI(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Stops MIDI Events on this Event associated with a GameObject.

member.name: M:AK.Wwise.Event.StopMIDI
member.summary: Stops all MIDI Events on this Event.

members.member: @brief Represents Wwise states as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise switch groups as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise banks as Unity assets.

member.name: T:WwiseObjectType
member.summary: Enumeration of Wwise object types that can be found in a Wwise project.

members.member: @brief Represents Wwise state groups as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise states as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise triggers as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise banks as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise objects as Unity assets.

member.name: P:WwiseObjectReference.Guid
member.summary: The Wwise GUID which is represented by the ScriptableObject's asset file name.

member.name: P:WwiseObjectReference.ObjectName
member.summary: The name of the Wwise object.

member.name: P:WwiseObjectReference.DisplayName
member.summary: The display name for the Wwise object.

member.name: P:WwiseObjectReference.WwiseObjectType
member.summary: The type of the Wwise object resource (for example: Event, State or Switch).

members.member: @brief Represents Wwise group value objects (such as states and switches) as Unity assets.

member.name: P:WwiseGroupValueObjectReference.GroupWwiseObjectType
member.summary: The type of the Wwise object resource (for example: Event, State or Switch).

member.name: P:WwiseGroupValueObjectReference.DisplayName
member.summary: The display name for the Wwise object.

members.member: @brief Represents Wwise events as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise aux buses as Unity assets.
@brief Represents Wwise RTPCs as Unity assets.
